ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was continued to March 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will contact Ms. Smith (Attorney).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Jan-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Angelia Green in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it did not know the status of the Creditor's Claims and that a Petition for Final Distribution needed to be filed. Ms. Green will either seek new Counsel or see if Ms. Greer is willing to assist with closing the estate. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of closing the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguirre.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Continued To Nov-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Ms. Green was not present. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of the order). An order to appear was set for October 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Green to appear regarding her further responsibilities to bring this matter to a close. Notice will be sent to all Parties and Creditors.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution And For Interim Allowance Of Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith appearing for and with Angela Green.
Ms Green informs the court that the supplemental declaration regarding the search for the will was filed today and explains the search process. The petition is granted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tina Paxton CSR #1558 Clerk: Rosie Noguera
